title: ecliptica alba var. zippeliana
intro: Ecliptica alba var. zippeliana, also known as Zippel's eclipta, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating liver and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ecliptica alba var. zippeliana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
